menu.tooltip: SKIN LAYOUT\nselect a different Skin Layout

panel.name: aux_top
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? not get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : false : get_hasmic ? not get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

panel.name: aux_bottom
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : get_hasmic ? get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

panel.name: aux_bottom_right
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? get_hastimecode ? skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : false : get_hasmic ? get_hastimecode ? skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

panel.name: aux_top
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? not get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : false : get_hasmic ? not get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

panel.name: aux_bottom
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : get_hasmic ? get_hastimecode ? not skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

panel.name: aux_bottom_right
panel.visibility: get_haslinein ? get_hastimecode ? skin_empty_buttons ? true : false : false : get_hasmic ? get_hastimecode ? skin_empty_buttons ? true : false

text.tooltip: No Microphone Input has been configured

button.tooltip: Record Microphone Input to a new Sample (N/A)\n! ! ! No Microphone Input has been configured
